acceptedIds: NY driver's license or non-driver ID
Utility bill, bank statement, government check, paycheck, or other government document showing name and address
exceptions: First-time voters who registered by mail and did not provide ID verification may need to show ID. All others may state their name and address.
provisionalBallotRules: Affidavit ballots are available for voters whose registration cannot be confirmed; counted after eligibility verification.
phonesAtPollsDetail: Photographing ballots or using phones to influence how others vote is prohibited.
